shortSummary: IT Service Management and Infrastructure professional with strong hands-on experience across Change Management, Incident Management, and Service Request operations.
detailedSummary: IT Service Management and Infrastructure professional with strong hands-on experience across Change Management, Incident Management, and Service Request operations in large-scale enterprise environments. Proven exposure to technical infrastructure support including Windows server operations, patch management, privileged access management, virtualization, and storage platforms. Experienced in KT delivery, cross-training, client-facing knowledge transfer, and major project transitions, with a strong ITIL-aligned governance and service delivery mindset.
philosophy: Discipline, proper documentation, and exact communication. Enterprise reliability lives and dies on clear impact analysis and predictable operations.
recruiterSummary: Nikhil is a meticulously organized IT Infrastructure Services Analyst capable of end-to-end incident, change, and access management. He is experienced operating within mature ITIL frameworks using platforms like ServiceNow and HPSM to safely shepherd major platform changes and rapidly restore service during high-severity events.
